wine_bars.name: La Dilettante
wine_bars.address: 11 Rue du Faubourg Bretonniere, 21200 Beaune, France
wine_bars.wine_program: Natural and biodynamic-leaning list anchored in small Burgundy growers, with a rotating by-the-glass selection alongside seasonal small plates with Burgundian and Japanese influences
wine_bars.description: Cosy bodega-style wine bar just outside Beaune's ring road, founded by 'Lolo' formerly of Caves Madeleine. Burgundy-led natural wine list poured beside seasonal small plates.

wine_bars.name: Le Bistrot Bourguignon
wine_bars.wine_program: Beaune's oldest wine bar, more than 20 wines by the glass spanning Chablis, Cote de Beaune, Cotes de Nuits and the Maconnais, with a cellar championing biodynamic and sustainable growers
wine_bars.description: Long-running wine bar on Rue Monge pouring more than 20 Burgundies by the glass. Owner Christophe Meux trained at La Cote d'Or; the list favours biodynamic and traditional growers.

wine_bars.name: Le Comptoir des Tontons
wine_bars.address: 22 Rue du Faubourg Madeleine, 21200 Beaune, France
wine_bars.wine_program: Deep affordable Burgundy list favoured by local winemakers, organic and grower-direct cuvees by the glass alongside share-plate tapas and larger Burgundian plates
wine_bars.description: Faubourg Madeleine bistro run by Romain Escoffier where Beaune's winemakers come to drink. Organic-leaning Burgundy list by the glass beside locally-sourced share plates.

wine_bars.name: Les Vins de Maurice
wine_bars.wine_program: Natural-wine specialist gathering place for low-intervention Burgundy and beyond, rotating grower cuvees by the glass with a deliberately minimal-sulfite focus
wine_bars.description: Small Beaune wine bar that has become the meeting point for natural-wine lovers in town. Low-intervention Burgundy and guest cuvees poured by the glass in a stripped-back room.

wine_bars.name: Le Bistrot du Coin
wine_bars.wine_program: Natural-wine bar with a roving selection of low-intervention cuvees from across France plus Burgundian grower bottlings by the glass and bottle
wine_bars.description: Relaxed wine bar on Place Ziem pouring natural cuvees from across France alongside Burgundian grower bottlings, popular for an evening glass in central Beaune.

wine_bars.name: Le Caveau des Arches Wine Cellar Bar
wine_bars.wine_program: Burgundy-anchored cellar list poured in a 15th-century vaulted cave, with by-the-glass selections across the Cote d'Or matched to regional tasting plates
wine_bars.description: Wine cellar bar inside a 15th-century vaulted cave in central Beaune, an offshoot of the long-running Caveau des Arches kitchen. By-the-glass Burgundy matched to regional plates.

wine_bars.name: Loiseau des Vignes Wine Bar
wine_bars.wine_program: More than 70 wines by the glass, one of the first such programmes in Europe, an exclusive Burgundy selection prepared by Meilleur Ouvrier de France sommelier Eric Goettelmann
wine_bars.description: The by-the-glass programme at the Michelin-starred Loiseau des Vignes near the Hospices, among the first in Europe to pour 70-plus wines by the glass, curated by MOF sommelier Eric Goettelmann.

wine_bars.name: Athenaeum Wine Tasting Counter
wine_bars.wine_program: Tasting counter inside the wine bookshop with more than 1,000 selected bottles, by-the-glass Burgundy pours chosen to accompany browsing the wine library
wine_bars.description: The tasting counter inside the Athenaeum wine bookshop opposite the Hospices, pouring Burgundy by the glass from a 1,000-bottle cellar amid the world's deepest collection of wine books.

wine_bars.name: Caveau de Chablis Wine Bar
wine_bars.wine_program: Chablis-only by-the-glass programme run by La Chablisienne, pouring Petit Chablis, Chablis, Premier Cru and Grand Cru side by side with regional cheese and charcuterie
signature_pours: Chablis Premier Cru Montee de Tonnerre
wine_bars.description: Evening wine bar of the Chablis cooperative on Boulevard Pasteur, pouring the full Chablis hierarchy by the glass with cheese and charcuterie until late.

wine_bars.name: L'Air du Temps Wine Bar
wine_bars.address: 3 Avenue de la Republique, 21200 Beaune, France
wine_bars.wine_program: Grower-direct Burgundy list built by tasting new vintages in the cellars each year, by-the-glass pours rotating with the seasons alongside a bistro menu
wine_bars.description: Bistro and wine bar on Avenue de la Republique whose list is built each year by tasting new vintages directly in the growers' cellars. Rotating by-the-glass Burgundy with seasonal plates.
